translations.en: We’re picking mushrooms in the woods.
translations.es: Estamos recogiendo setas en el bosque.
translations.fr: On cueille des champignons dans les bois.
translations.yue: 我哋喺森林入面採蘑菇。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang hái nấm trong rừng.
translations.nl: We plukken paddenstoelen in het bos.
translations.hi: हम जंगल में मशरूम तोड़ रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang memetik jamur di hutan.
translations.ja: 森できのこを採っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; main predicate meaning ‘to collect/pick’.
Common noun (Austrian usage for mushrooms), plural; direct object of ‘sammeln’.
Preposition ‘in’ contracted with the definite article ‘dem’; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘im’ (locative).

sentences.target: Ich brate die Schwammerl mit Zwiebeln an.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbraːtə diː ˈʃvamɐl mɪt ˈtsviːbəln an/

translations.de: Ich brate die Schwammerl mit Zwiebeln an.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbraːtə diː ˈʃvamɐl mɪt ˈtsviːbəln an/
translations.en: I’m sautéing the mushrooms with onions.
translations.es: Estoy salteando las setas con cebolla.
translations.fr: Je fais revenir les champignons avec des oignons.
translations.pt: Estou refogando os cogumelos com cebola.
translations.he: אני מקפיץ את הפטריות עם בצל.
translations.vi: Tôi đang xào nấm với hành tây.
translations.nl: Ik bak de paddenstoelen met ui.
translations.hi: मैं प्याज़ के साथ मशरूम भून रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang menumis jamur dengan bawang bombay.
translations.ja: 玉ねぎと一緒にきのこを炒めています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb. Together with the separable particle ‘an’ forms the verb ‘anbraten’ (‘to brown/sauté’).
Definite article, plural accusative; marks the direct object ‘Schwammerl’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition; introduces an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition ‘mit’.
Separable verbal particle; combines with ‘brate’ to form ‘anbraten’ (‘to brown/sauté’). Appears clause-final due to verb-second.

sentences.target: Die Kinder finden gleich frische Schwammerl.

translations.de: Die Kinder finden gleich frische Schwammerl.
translations.en: The kids quickly find fresh mushrooms.
translations.es: Los niños encuentran enseguida setas frescas.
translations.fr: Les enfants trouvent vite des champignons frais.
translations.it: I bambini trovano subito funghi freschi.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们很快就找到新鲜的蘑菇。
translations.yue: 小朋友好快就搵到新鮮嘅蘑菇。
translations.pt: As crianças encontram rapidamente cogumelos frescos.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ nhanh chóng tìm được nấm tươi.
translations.ar: الأطفال يعثرون سريعًا على فطر طازج.
translations.nl: De kinderen vinden snel verse paddenstoelen.
translations.hu: A gyerekek hamar friss gombát találnak.
translations.hi: बच्चे जल्दी ही ताज़ा मशरूम ढूँढ़ लेते हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά βρίσκουν γρήγορα φρέσκα μανιτάρια.
translations.ja: 子どもたちはすぐに新鮮なきのこを見つけます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determiner for ‘Kinder’ (nominative).
Common noun, plural; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Adverb; modifies the verb, indicating immediacy.
Attributive adjective, plural accusative; modifies ‘Schwammerl’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘finden’.

sentences.target: Im Korb liegen noch drei Schwammerl.

translations.de: Im Korb liegen noch drei Schwammerl.
translations.en: There are still three mushrooms in the basket.
translations.es: En la cesta aún quedan tres setas.
translations.fr: Il reste encore trois champignons dans le panier.
translations.it: Nel cestino ci sono ancora tre funghi.
translations.ko: 바구니에 아직 버섯이 세 개 남아 있어요.
translations.ru: В корзине ещё лежат три гриба.
translations.pt: No cesto ainda há três cogumelos.
translations.vi: Trong giỏ vẫn còn ba cây nấm.
translations.ar: ما زال في السلة ثلاث حبات فطر.
translations.nl: In de mand liggen nog drie paddenstoelen.
translations.uk: У кошику ще лежать три гриби.
translations.hu: A kosárban még három gomba van.
translations.hi: टोकरी में अभी भी तीन मशरूम हैं.
translations.pl: W koszyku wciąż leżą trzy grzyby.
translations.el: Στο καλάθι υπάρχουν ακόμη τρία μανιτάρια.
translations.nb: Det ligger fortsatt tre sopp i kurven.
translations.id: Di keranjang masih ada tiga jamur.
translations.sv: Det ligger fortfarande tre svampar i korgen.
translations.ro: În coș mai sunt încă trei ciuperci.
translations.cs: V košíku jsou ještě tři houby.
translations.da: Der ligger stadig tre svampe i kurven.
translations.ja: かごにまだきのこが三つ残っています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition ‘in’ contracted with the definite article ‘dem’; fronts a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘Im’.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate. Verb-second order with fronted PP.
Adverb; modifies the verb, indicating continuation.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the following noun and serves as part of the subject NP.
Common noun, plural; head of the subject noun phrase agreeing with ‘liegen’.
